title: DeepDepthNetherite
body:
This mod brings netherite into the surface world in a small count of 3 max. This can
be used for Modpacks / Worlds / Servers for those who want to close up the Nether. 

Mod is uploaded only on Modrinth & Curseforge
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deep-depth-netherite
